title: Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
